items.title: More Record Closing Highs as Fed Government May Be Closing
items.description: All market indexes closed higher today on renewed exuberance for AI.

items.title: Job Openings Increase Slightly In August, Higher Than Expected
items.description: Job openings increased slightly in August, hitting 7.227 million vacancies according to the latest Job Openings and Labor Turnover Survey (JOLTS)

items.title: Labor Market In New Era Of Low Churn, Uneasy Calm, Government Job Losses, And Crackdown On Illegal Immigration
items.description: The red-hot turnover in the labor market has settled down from the chaos and churn in 2021 and 2022.

items.title: The Good, The Bad, And The Ugly Of The U.S. Economy
items.description: The U.S. economy grew 3.8% in Q2, with robust momentum expected to continue for Q3. Click here for more information on the U.S. Economy.

items.title: Buy High Visibility Cash Flows For The Rate Cut Cycle
items.description: Upcoming Fed rate cuts should benefit REITs and utilities most, as their bond-like cash flows are easier to revalue. Click here for more on Market Outlook.
